HGSS.696.0001:
Wow, you’re tough. I haven’t battled
that seriously in a long time.\f
Could I get your phone number?\f
I’d like to battle again after I
heal my Pokémon. [0200,0000]
HGSS.696.0002:
How should I beat you? I’m tormented
by those thoughts all the time...
HGSS.696.0003:
OK... I understand...
But if you change your mind, give me\r
a shout anytime.
HGSS.696.0004:
Could I get your phone number?\f
I’d like to battle again after I
heal my Pokémon. [0200,0000]
HGSS.696.0006:
Huh? This voice...
You’re nearby, aren’t you?\r
Let’s talk in person.
HGSS.696.0007:
My [0100,000A,0000] might be greater than
I imagined.\f
I doubt I’ll see a wild [0100,000A,0000]
that’s better than mine.
HGSS.696.0008:
A while back, I tried to catch a wild
[0100,000B,0000].\f
It managed to elude me.\f
One wrong decision could mean total
failure... You ought to be careful, too.
HGSS.696.0009:
I managed to barely defeat
[0100,000B,0000] the other day.\f
I’ve never seen a wild [0100,000B,0000]
get that strong...\f
You shouldn’t let your guard down, even
against a Pokémon you’re used\r
to seeing.
HGSS.696.0010:
Let’s battle!\f
I’ll be waiting on [0104,0003,0000].
Give me a shout when you’re close.
HGSS.696.0011:
[0103,0000,0000], why aren’t you here?\f
I’ll take you down on
[0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.696.0012:
[0103,0000,0000], why aren’t you here?\f
I’ll take you down on
[0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.696.0013:
You know, I just can’t get over how
strong you are...\f
I obsess over how to beat you every
single day...
